title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd in Aurangabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd!
